title: selliguea triphylla
intro: Selliguea triphylla, also known as Pilea triphylla or Triphylla Pilea, is a plant species belonging to the family Urticaceae. It is traditionally used in herbal medicine, particularly in Southeast Asia, for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antifungal activities. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, alleviating respiratory issues, and aiding in wound healing. In herbal preparations, Selliguea triphylla is often used in teas, infusions, and topical applications, and its leaves are typically dried and crushed before being used in traditional medicine.
